entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop affected by grain mold disease

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD
entities.description: A biotic constraint and disease that affects sorghum grain yield and quality

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by the crop

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITY
entities.description: The overall quality of the sorghum grain

entities.name: WET AND HUMID CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions that favor the development of grain mold fungi

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD FUNGI
entities.description: Fungi that cause the development of grain mold

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The yield of seeds, which can be reduced by grain mold

entities.name: MARKET VALUE
entities.description: The economic value of the grain in the market

entities.name: STORAGE QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of the grain during storage

entities.name: VIABILITY
entities.description: The ability of the seeds to remain alive and capable of germination

entities.name: PROCESSING QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of the seed for food and feed processing

entities.name: MYCOTOXINS
entities.description: Toxic secondary metabolites produced by mold-causal fungi

entities.name: ANIMALS
entities.description: Organisms that consume feed containing mycotoxins

entities.name: GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate at which animals grow, which can be slowed by mycotoxins
